mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, name, duration, monthly_price, description FROM course
SELECT id, category_id, name, duration, monthly_price, description FROM course WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, category_id, name, duration, monthly_price, description FROM course WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (category_id, name, duration, monthly_price, description) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{duration}, #{monthlyPrice}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, duration = #{duration}, monthly_price = #{monthlyPrice}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
